# WPShadow Team Reference

Quick reference for team member GitHub usernames and roles.

## Core Team

### Community Manager
- **Name:** Allison Smith
- **GitHub:** [@allisonsmithcreates](https://github.com/allisonsmithcreates)
- **Role:** Community Manager, Content Strategy
- **Responsibilities:**
  - Knowledge Base content review and strategy
  - Community engagement and support
  - Content quality assurance
  - User feedback coordination

## Quick Assignment Guide

When creating issues for specific team members:

```bash
# Community Manager (Content/KB articles)
--assignee allisonsmithcreates

# Project Owner
--assignee thisismyurl
```

## Contact

For urgent matters, refer to internal team communication channels.
